category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/gptme/gptme describes gptme as an agent in the terminal with local tools.
display_name_sources: Official docs and repository use the name gptme: https://gptme.org/docs/ and https://github.com/gptme/gptme.
docs_sources: Official repository links to https://gptme.org/docs/ as documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official docs URL.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository at https://github.com/gptme/gptme is linked from gptme documentation and describes the project.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository topics/README describe agent, CLI, LLM, and terminal-oriented functionality.
source_facts.description identifies a terminal AI assistant.
